description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a smooth, medium-gray fabric. The sofa features three backrest cushions and a chaise lounge section extending from the left side, providing ample seating and lounging space. The armrests are straight, boxy, and padded, matching the overall minimalist design. The seat and back cushions are uniform in size and appear to be attached, contributing to a clean, streamlined look. The legs are short and mostly hidden, giving the sofa a low-profile appearance. The upholstery is solid in color with a matte finish, and the overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden or metal frame beneath the fabric.
description: A modern L-shaped gray sectional sofa with three back cushions, a left-side chaise, and boxy padded armrests. The upholstery is solid gray and smooth, with a low-profile, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the L-shaped layout, three back cushions, left-side chaise, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the straight, padded armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniform height of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the main seating area, right armrest, and the end of the chaise section.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform, attached back cushions and a single continuous seat cushion with an integrated chaise section; all cushions are rectangular and flush with the sofa frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests present on both ends, matching the seat height and featuring a padded, minimalist design with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners and mostly recessed, likely made of wood or plastic, with minimal visibility and no decorative features.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three attached, rectangular cushions; no tufting or decorative stitching.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
